notes.value:
Warne's N.Y. office began using "Inc." in 1930--Cf. House of Warne, p. 16; copy was purchased in 1934.

Matches copy described as "recent New York edition"--Cf. Quinby, pp. 30-31

Illustrated endpapers--Cf. Quinby, plate XV

Copy 1 bound in green paper-covered boards.  Copy 2 bound in brown paper-covered boards.  Both copies stamped in white, with paper label pasted in blind-stamped space on front cover.  Copy 1 printed on thicker paper.  In both copies, text is printed on wove paper, and illustrations printed on coated paper.  Copies identical in every other way, including endpapers.

Copy 2 from the collection of Sarah Weld King Conklin.
